use_cases: Hero section background with ambient animated pixel effect
Landing page visual decoration for tech or gaming brands
Loading state or skeleton screen with dynamic pixel animation
Splash screen or intro animation for applications
ai_summary: A canvas-based animated pixel grid component that renders a customizable grid of randomly flickering pixels with configurable lifecycles. Each pixel independently cycles through lit and unlit states with configurable born/death fade animations, opacity levels, and timing. Supports glow effects and full customization of colors, sizes, and spacing for creating ambient visual effects in hero sections or backgrounds.
